backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor that combines blob storage and authorization mixins, and exposes CRUD/search endpoints for user profiles stored in a Principal-keyed map with permission checks.
feature_evidence.json: A feature evidence report mapping redesign feature IDs (StoriesStrip, PostCard, ProfilePage, BottomNav, etc.) to their implementing files, component dependencies, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a reference for the build/planning process.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry point that defines OKLCH-based CSS custom property tokens for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, chart, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the ConnectSphere React app that mounts the root div and loads the main TypeScript entry point as an ES module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that handles authentication state, profile setup gating, theme initialization, and client-side page routing by rendering the appropriate page inside AppLayout.
frontend/src/components/AppHeader.tsx: Sticky top header component that renders the ConnectSphere logo and notification bell on the home page, and a back-navigation button with page title on sub-pages, plus a logout button on the profile page.
frontend/src/components/AppLayout.tsx: Layout wrapper component that composes AppHeader, an animated main content area, and the optional BottomNav into a max-width centered column.
frontend/src/components/BottomNav.tsx: Renders a fixed floating pill-shaped bottom navigation bar with five nav items (Home, Search, Create Post, Chat, Profile), highlighting the active page and styling the Create Post button distinctly.
frontend/src/components/PostCard.tsx: Displays a single social post card with optional image, content, author info, and action buttons (like, comment, share, delete/edit for owned posts).
frontend/src/components/StoriesStrip.tsx: Renders a horizontally scrollable strip of story thumbnails plus an 'Add Story' button, navigating to story creation or viewing on click.
frontend/src/components/ThemeToggle.tsx: A button component that toggles between dark and light themes using the useTheme hook, displaying a Sun or Moon icon accordingly.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) via React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries whenever the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via a React context and custom hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating user profile data (caller profile, specific user profile, save profile, search users) against the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useTheme.ts: Custom hook that manages the current theme state, persists it, and applies it to the document, exposing a toggleTheme function.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining Tailwind base/components/utilities, CSS custom properties for a purple-blue themed design system (light and dark modes), and utility classes for gradients, glassmorphism, and scrollbar hiding.
frontend/src/lib/mockData.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces and sample data (posts, stories, notifications, conversations, messages) for frontend features not yet backed by the real API, plus a utility to generate avatar URLs.
frontend/src/lib/theme.ts: Provides helpers to read, apply, and persist a light/dark theme preference using localStorage and the system color-scheme media query.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped in React Query and Internet Identity providers.
frontend/src/pages/ChatListPage.tsx: Displays a searchable list of mock conversations with unread badges, navigating to a chat thread on selection.
frontend/src/pages/ChatThreadPage.tsx: Renders a full chat thread for a given conversation using mock messages, supports sending new messages, and auto-scrolls to the latest message.
frontend/src/pages/CreatePostPage.tsx: Form page for composing a new post with optional image attachment, simulating submission with a short delay before navigating home.
frontend/src/pages/CreateStoryPage.tsx: Form page for creating a story in either photo or text mode, with a preview and simulated submission that returns to the home page.
frontend/src/pages/EditProfilePage.tsx: A form page that allows the current user to edit their display name, username, bio, and avatar, saving changes via the `useSaveCallerUserProfile` mutation and navigating back to the profile page on success.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: The main feed page that displays a stories strip and a list of post cards using mock data, with local state handling for likes and deletions.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: A marketing landing page with a hero image, feature highlights, and an Internet Identity login button for unauthenticated users.
frontend/src/pages/NotificationsPage.tsx: Displays a list of mock notifications (likes, follows, comments) and automatically marks them all as read one second after the page opens.
frontend/src/pages/PostDetailPage.tsx: Shows a single post's full content with a like button and a comment thread, allowing the current user to add or delete their own comments using local state and mock data.
frontend/src/pages/ProfilePage.tsx: Renders the current user's profile with their avatar, bio, stats (posts, followers, following), and a grid of their posts, with navigation to the edit profile page.
frontend/src/pages/ProfileSetupPage.tsx: A profile setup form page that collects display name, username, bio, and avatar from new users, then saves the profile via the `useSaveCallerUserProfile` hook and calls `onComplete` on success.
frontend/src/pages/SearchPage.tsx: A user search page with a text input that queries users via `useSearchUsers`, displays results with avatars and bios, and allows toggling follow/unfollow state locally.
frontend/src/pages/StoryViewerPage.tsx: A fullscreen story viewer that displays a single story (image or text) from `SAMPLE_STORIES` with a progress bar, author info, and options to delete (if own) or close.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters (supporting both regular and hash-based routing), persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining the design system: custom OKLCH-based color tokens, extended border radii, box shadows, font families (Inter, Plus Jakarta Sans), and keyframe animations for the ConnectSphere app.
project_state.json: Project state manifest describing ConnectSphere's architecture (React/TypeScript frontend, Motoko/IC backend), implemented features, known issues, and design guidelines for build planning.
